summary: Action needed: Your input needed: OKR onboarding session

alerts.title: Your input needed: OKR onboarding session
alerts.body:
I can't prioritise tasks across agents without knowing your goals.
This is the most important thing we haven't done yet.
Verdict: schedule this before Milestone 5 begins — everything downstream depends on it.
→ When ready, tell me: 'Let's do the OKR session'

alerts.title: Infra flagged (monitoring): OpenClaw 2026.4.9 → 2026.4.11  (released 2026-04-12)
alerts.body:
I've reviewed Infra's analysis. My take: low strategic risk.
The changes are mostly memory/UI improvements — nothing that affects our core setup.
Recommendation: update at your next convenient moment, not urgently.
→ When you're ready: openclaw update (or however you installed it)
